item.title: 2025 GIINsight: Impact Investing Allocations, Activity & Performance
item.description: The GIIN's 2025 GIINsight report shows impact investing AUM reaching $1.7 trillion globally, with continued growth in blended finance structures and increased DFI co-investment activity across emerging markets.

item.title: Catalytic Capital: Essential to Achieving the SDGs
item.description: A new brief from the GIIN on how catalytic capital from foundations and DFIs is unlocking impact investing capital in sub-Saharan Africa, with a focus on first-loss tranches in emerging manager funds.

item.title: Impact Measurement in Blended Finance: Practitioner Notes
item.description: Practitioner notes on impact measurement in blended finance vehicles, drawing on case studies from Convergence and DFI co-investments.
